message:
feat(convoy): add --merge flag to gt convoy create and gt sling

Add --merge flag accepting direct/mr/local to control how completed
work lands. Stored on convoy bead metadata as "Merge: <strategy>".

- direct: push branch directly to main (no MR, no refinery)
- mr: current behavior, merge queue via refinery (default)
- local: keep on feature branch (upstream PRs, human review)

gt sling propagates --merge to auto-created convoys. Strategy is
visible in gt convoy status output.

Closes: gt-myofa.2

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
